text:
I feel a sense of anticipation in the first image; the empty, neatly lit space invites questions about purpose and possibility. There is calm, but also an underlying curiosity, as if something important is meant to happen here.

In the second image, surrounded by words and ideas on the wall, I sense intellectual excitement and engagement. Someone reads intently—the atmosphere is alive with the energy of discovery and learning. I feel connected to the pursuit of knowledge and the exchange of thoughts in this creative environment.
